    88→
    89→---
    90→
    91→## ⚙️ Coding Rules
    92→
    93→### TypeScript
    94→
    95→- **Strict mode always on.** No `any`, no `ts-ignore` without a comment explaining why.
    96→- Use `type` for data shapes. Use `interface` only for extendable contracts.
    97→- All async functions must have explicit return types.
    98→- Use `zod` for all runtime validation — both on API request bodies and responses from Shopee/TikTok.
    99→
   100→### Naming Conventions
   101→
   102→| Item | Convention | Example |
   103→|------|-----------|---------|
   104→| Files | kebab-case | `product-service.ts` |
   105→| Components | PascalCase | `ProductCard.tsx` |
   106→| Screens | PascalCase + Screen suffix | `BulkUpdateScreen.tsx` |
   107→| Hooks | camelCase + use prefix | `useProductList.ts` |
   108→| Stores | camelCase + Store suffix | `shopStore.ts` |
   109→| Types | PascalCase | `ShopConnection`, `ProductVariant` |
   110→| Env vars | SCREAMING_SNAKE | `SHOPEE_PARTNER_ID` |
   111→| DB tables | snake_case | `shop_connections` |
   112→| DB columns | snake_case | `access_token` |
   113→
   114→### Backend Module Structure
   115→
   116→Every module in `src/modules/` must follow this exact pattern:
   117→
   118→```
   119→modules/products/
   120→├── product.route.ts     → Fastify route registrations
   121→├── product.service.ts   → Business logic
   122→├── product.schema.ts    → Zod schemas for request/response
   123→└── product.types.ts     → TypeScript types for this module
   124→```
   125→
   126→No exceptions. No logic in route files. No DB calls outside service files.
   127→
   128→### Integration Files
   129→
   130→Files inside `src/integrations/shopee/` and `src/integrations/tiktok/` are the **only** places that may call Shopee or TikTok external APIs. Services call integration functions. Integration functions never call services.
   131→
   132→```
   133→integrations/shopee/
   134→├── shopee.client.ts     → Axios instance + HMAC signing
   135→├── shopee.product.ts    → Product-related API calls
   136→├── shopee.inventory.ts  → Stock API calls
   137→├── shopee.auth.ts       → OAuth token refresh
   138→└── shopee.types.ts      → Raw Shopee API response types
   139→```
   140→
   141→### Mobile API Layer
   142→
   143→- The mobile app **never** calls Shopee or TikTok APIs directly.
   144→- All calls go through `src/api/` which points to the backend.
   145→- Each file in `src/api/` maps to one backend module.
   146→
   147→```typescript
   148→// ✅ Correct
   149→import { updateStock } from '@/api/inventory';
   150→
   151→// ❌ Wrong — never do this in mobile
   152→import axios from 'axios';
   153→axios.post('https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/...')
   154→```
   155→
   156→---
   157→
   158→## 🔄 State Management Rules
   159→
   160→### Zustand Stores
   161→
   162→One store per domain. Stores only hold **UI state** and **cached data**.
   163→
   164→| Store | Holds |
   165→|-------|-------|
   166→| `authStore` | Current user session, JWT |
   167→| `shopStore` | Connected shops list, active shop |
   168→| `productStore` | Product list cache, selected products for bulk |
   169→| `bulkStore` | Bulk job progress, results |
   170→| `uiStore` | Loading states, modals, toasts |
   171→
   172→### TanStack Query
   173→
   174→Use React Query for all **server state** (products, inventory, prices). Zustand is for UI state only.
   175→
   176→```typescript
   177→// Query keys must be defined in constants/queryKeys.ts
   178→export const QUERY_KEYS = {
   179→  products: (shopId: string) => ['products', shopId],
   180→  inventory: (productId: string) => ['inventory', productId],
   181→} as const;
   182→```
   183→
   184→---
   185→
   186→## 🌐 Environment Variables
   187→
   188→Never hardcode any URL, key, or secret. All env vars are defined in `.env.example`.
   189→
   190→### Mobile (Expo) — `apps/mobile/.env`
   191→
   192→```
   193→EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3000
   194→```
   195→
   196→Only `EXPO_PUBLIC_` prefixed vars are exposed to the app bundle. Never put secrets here.
   197→
   198→### Backend — `apps/backend/.env`
   199→
   200→```
   201→NODE_ENV=development
   202→PORT=3000
   203→DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...
   204→REDIS_URL=redis://...
   205→JWT_SECRET=...
   206→SHOPEE_PARTNER_ID=...
   207→SHOPEE_PARTNER_KEY=...
   208→TIKTOK_APP_KEY=...
   209→TIKTOK_APP_SECRET=...
   210→```
   211→
   212→---
   213→
   214→## 🐳 Docker & Infrastructure
   215→
   216→- Local dev uses `docker/docker-compose.yml` (PostgreSQL + Redis + backend together)
   217→- The mobile Expo app runs locally with Metro, pointing at the backend container
   218→- Production backend deploys to Railway (supports Docker + managed Postgres + Redis)
   219→- Never commit `.env` files — only `.env.example`
   220→
   221→Services in docker-compose:
   222→
   223→| Service | Image | Port |
   224→|---------|-------|------|
   225→| `postgres` | postgres:16-alpine | 5432 |
   226→| `redis` | redis:7-alpine | 6379 |
   227→| `backend` | ./apps/backend | 3000 |
   228→| `nginx` | nginx:alpine | 80 |
   229→
   230→---
   231→
   232→## 📋 Documentation Update Rules
   233→
   234→**An agent MUST update the relevant markdown files when:**
   235→
   236→| Change | Update Required |
   237→|--------|----------------|
   238→| New API endpoint added | `docs/API.md` → add under correct module section |
   239→| New DB table/column | `docs/SCHEMA.md` → update Prisma schema section + ER diagram description |
   240→| New screen added | `docs/UI_DESIGN.md` → add screen spec, `docs/PROJECT_MAP.md` → update file tree |
   241→| New file/folder created | `docs/PROJECT_MAP.md` → update tree and dependency section |
   242→| Milestone completed | `docs/ROADMAP.md` → mark milestone done with date |
   243→| New env var needed | `.env.example` → add with comment |
   244→
   245→**Format for marking roadmap items complete:**
   246→```
   247→- [x] Milestone Name — ✅ Done YYYY-MM-DD
   248→```
   249→
   250→---
   251→
   252→## 🚫 Forbidden Patterns
   253→
   254→- No `console.log` in production code — use the logger utility (`src/utils/logger.ts`)
   255→- No raw SQL — Prisma ORM only
   256→- No inline styles in React Native — use StyleSheet or NativeWind classes
   257→- No API secrets in mobile bundle
   258→- No business logic in navigation files
   259→- No direct Shopee/TikTok calls outside `integrations/`
   260→- No `useEffect` for data fetching — use React Query
   261→- No unhandled Promise rejections — all async must be try/catch or `.catch()`
   262→- No plural screen names — `ProductScreen` not `ProductsScreen`
   263→- No index files re-exporting everything — import from the file directly
   264→
   265→---
   266→
   267→## 🔐 Authentication Flow
   268→
   269→1. User opens app → `authStore` checks for stored JWT
   270→2. If no JWT → redirect to `LoginScreen`
   271→3. Login hits `POST /api/auth/login` on backend
   272→4. Backend returns `{ accessToken, refreshToken }`
   273→5. Store `accessToken` in memory (Zustand), `refreshToken` in SecureStore
   274→6. All API requests attach `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`
   275→7. On 401 → auto-refresh using `refreshToken` → retry request
   276→8. OAuth for Shopee/TikTok is separate — handled in `ConnectShopScreen`
   277→
   278→---
   279→
   280→## 🔁 Bulk Update Queue Rules
   281→
   282→- Bulk jobs use BullMQ with Redis as broker
   283→- Each bulk job processes max 50 items per batch
   284→- Failed items are retried 3 times with exponential backoff
   285→- Job progress is pushed to client via polling endpoint `GET /api/bulk/:jobId/status`
   286→- Never do bulk operations synchronously in a request handler
   287→
   288→---
   289→
   290→## 📱 Mobile Performance Rules
   291→
   292→- All list screens use `@shopify/flash-list` — never FlatList for product lists
   293→- Images use `expo-image` with caching enabled
   294→- Skeleton loading for every data-fetching screen (no spinners alone)
   295→- No screen mounts network calls in `useEffect` — use React Query `useQuery`
   296→- Navigation transitions must be 60fps — no heavy logic on screen mount
   297→
   298→---
   299→
   300→## 🧪 Testing Conventions
   301→
   302→- Backend: Vitest for unit + integration tests
   303→- Mobile: Jest + React Native Testing Library
   304→- Test files colocated: `product.service.test.ts` next to `product.service.ts`
   305→- Integration tests for all external API clients using MSW mocks
   306→- Min coverage for services: 80%
   307→
   308→---
   309→
   310→*Last updated: 2026-06-29 | Version: 1.0.0*
   311→

   224→## Request Data Flow
   225→
   226→### 1. Login Flow
   227→
   228→```mermaid
   229→sequenceDiagram
   230→  participant App as Mobile App
   231→  participant Store as authStore
   232→  participant API as api/auth.ts
   233→  participant Backend as auth.route.ts
   234→  participant Service as auth.service.ts
   235→  participant DB as PostgreSQL
   236→
   237→  App->>Store: login(email, password)
   238→  Store->>API: authApi.login()
   239→  API->>Backend: POST /api/auth/login
   240→  Backend->>Service: authService.login()
   241→  Service->>DB: findUnique(email)
   242→  DB-->>Service: User record
   243→  Service->>Service: bcrypt.compare()
   244→  Service-->>Backend: { id, email, name }
   245→  Backend->>Backend: jwt.sign() → accessToken
   246→  Service->>DB: create RefreshToken
   247→  Backend-->>API: { user, accessToken, refreshToken }
   248→  API-->>Store: result
   249→  Store->>Store: setAccessToken(accessToken)
   250→  Store->>Store: SecureStore.setItem(refreshToken)
   251→  Store-->>App: isAuthenticated = true
   252→  App->>App: Navigate to MainTabs
   253→```

   257→### 2. Shopee OAuth Flow
   258→
   259→```mermaid
   260→sequenceDiagram
   261→  participant App as Mobile App
   262→  participant WV as WebView
   263→  participant Backend as shop.route.ts
   264→  participant Integration as shopee.auth.ts
   265→  participant Shopee as Shopee OAuth
   266→  participant DB as PostgreSQL
   267→
   268→  App->>Backend: GET /api/shops/shopee/auth-url
   269→  Backend->>Integration: shopeeAuth.generateAuthUrl()
   270→  Integration->>DB: create OAuthState (CSRF)
   271→  Integration-->>Backend: { url, state }
   272→  Backend-->>App: { url, state }
   273→  App->>WV: Open OAuth URL
   274→  WV->>Shopee: User authorizes
   275→  Shopee-->>WV: Redirect to /api/shops/shopee/callback?code=...
   276→  WV->>Backend: GET /api/shops/shopee/callback (intercepted deep link)
   277→  Backend->>Integration: shopeeAuth.exchangeCode(code, shopId)
   278→  Integration->>Shopee: POST /api/v2/auth/token/get
   279→  Shopee-->>Integration: { access_token, refresh_token }
   280→  Integration->>DB: encrypt tokens, create ShopConnection
   281→  Backend-->>App: { shop: { id, shopName, platform } }
   282→  App->>App: Close WebView → Show success
   283→```

   287→### 3. Bulk Stock Update Flow
   288→
   289→```mermaid
   290→sequenceDiagram
   291→  participant App as Mobile App
   292→  participant BulkStore as bulkStore
   293→  participant API as api/bulk.ts
   294→  participant Backend as bulk.route.ts
   295→  participant Service as bulk.service.ts
   296→  participant Queue as BullMQ Queue
   297→  participant Worker as bulk-update.worker.ts
   298→  participant Integration as shopee.product.ts
   299→  participant DB as PostgreSQL
   300→
   301→  App->>BulkStore: selectedProducts (long-press select)
   302→  App->>App: Navigate BulkStockUpdateScreen
   303→  App->>App: Fill stock values per variant
   304→  App->>API: bulkApi.createStockJob(shopId, items)
   305→  API->>Backend: POST /api/bulk/stock
   306→  Backend->>Service: createStockJob()
   307→  Service->>DB: create BulkJob (QUEUED)
   308→  Service->>Queue: bulkQueue.add('process-stock', payload)
   309→  Queue-->>Service: { jobId }
   310→  Service-->>Backend: { jobId, status: QUEUED, estimatedSeconds }
   311→  Backend-->>API: 202 Accepted
   312→  API-->>App: { jobId }
   313→  App->>App: Navigate BulkProgressScreen(jobId)
   314→
   315→  loop Poll every 2s
   316→    App->>API: bulkApi.getStatus(jobId)
   317→    API->>Backend: GET /api/bulk/:jobId/status
   318→    Backend->>DB: findUnique BulkJob
   319→    DB-->>Backend: { progress, successCount, failedCount }
   320→    Backend-->>App: Job status
   321→    App->>App: Update progress UI
   322→  end
   323→
   324→  Worker->>Queue: dequeue job
   325→  Worker->>Worker: process in batches of 50
   326→  Worker->>Integration: shopeeProduct.updateStock()
   327→  Integration->>Integration: Shopee API call + 200ms delay
   328→  Worker->>DB: updateLog per item
   329→  Worker->>DB: update BulkJob progress
   330→  Worker->>DB: BulkJob status = COMPLETED | PARTIAL
   331→```

   334→
   335→### 4. Token Auto-Refresh Flow
   336→
   337→```mermaid
   338→sequenceDiagram
   339→  participant App as Any API call
   340→  participant Interceptor as Axios Interceptor
   341→  participant SecureStore as SecureStore
   342→  participant Backend as /api/auth/refresh
   343→
   344→  App->>Interceptor: Request (expired accessToken)
   345→  Interceptor->>Backend: Original request
   346→  Backend-->>Interceptor: 401 Unauthorized
   347→  Interceptor->>Interceptor: isRefreshing = true
   348→  Interceptor->>SecureStore: get refreshToken
   349→  SecureStore-->>Interceptor: refreshToken
   350→  Interceptor->>Backend: POST /api/auth/refresh { refreshToken }
   351→  Backend-->>Interceptor: { newAccessToken, newRefreshToken }
   352→  Interceptor->>Interceptor: setAccessToken(newAccessToken) [in-memory]
   353→  Interceptor->>SecureStore: store newRefreshToken
   354→  Interceptor->>Interceptor: Retry all pending requests
   355→  Interceptor-->>App: Original response
   356→```

   558→## Key Implementation Notes for Agents
   559→
   560→### When adding a new API endpoint:
   561→1. Add route in the correct `modules/<name>/<name>.route.ts`
   562→2. Add business logic in `modules/<name>/<name>.service.ts`
   563→3. Add Zod schema in `modules/<name>/<name>.schema.ts`
   564→4. If it calls Shopee/TikTok, add function in `integrations/`
   565→5. Update `docs/API.md` with the new endpoint contract
   566→6. Add corresponding API function in `apps/mobile/src/api/`
   567→
   568→### When adding a new screen:
   569→1. Create `apps/mobile/src/screens/<ScreenName>Screen.tsx`
   570→2. Register in `RootNavigator.tsx` or `MainTabNavigator.tsx`
   571→3. Add to `RootStackParamList` or `MainTabParamList` in `types/index.ts`
   572→4. Update `docs/PROJECT_MAP.md` file tree
   573→5. Reference `docs/UI_DESIGN.md` for the exact spec
   574→
   575→### When adding a new store:
   576→1. Create `apps/mobile/src/stores/<domain>Store.ts`
   577→2. Follow Zustand pattern: `create<State>((set, get) => ({...}))`
   578→3. Store only UI state — server state goes in React Query
   579→4. Document in `docs/AGENT.md` store table

     6→
     7→## Design Principles
     8→
     9→- All primary keys are `cuid()` strings, never sequential integers
    10→- All `createdAt`/`updatedAt` managed by Prisma `@updatedAt`
    11→- Sensitive fields (access_token, refresh_token) are AES-256 encrypted before storage
    12→- Soft deletes where applicable (use `deletedAt` timestamp instead of hard delete)
    13→- Foreign keys always indexed
    14→- No JSON blobs for queryable fields — normalize into columns
    15→

    18→## Prisma Schema
    19→
    20→```prisma
    21→// apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma
    22→
    23→generator client {
    24→  provider = "prisma-client-js"
    25→}
    26→
    27→datasource db {
    28→  provider = "postgresql"
    29→  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
    30→}
    31→
    32→// ─── Users ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    33→
    34→model User {
    35→  id            String    @id @default(cuid())
    36→  email         String    @unique
    37→  name          String
    38→  passwordHash  String    @map("password_hash")
    39→  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at")
    40→  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
    41→  deletedAt     DateTime? @map("deleted_at")
    42→
    43→  refreshTokens RefreshToken[]
    44→  shops         ShopConnection[]
    45→  bulkJobs      BulkJob[]
    46→
    47→  @@map("users")
    48→}
    49→
    50→// ─── Auth ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    51→
    52→model RefreshToken {
    53→  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
    54→  token     String   @unique
    55→  userId    String   @map("user_id")
    56→  expiresAt DateTime @map("expires_at")
    57→  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
    58→  revokedAt DateTime? @map("revoked_at")
    59→
    60→  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
    61→
    62→  @@index([userId])
    63→  @@index([token])
    64→  @@map("refresh_tokens")
    65→}
    66→
    67→// ─── Shop Connections ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    68→
    69→enum Platform {
    70→  SHOPEE
    71→  TIKTOK
    72→}
    73→
    74→enum ShopStatus {
    75→  ACTIVE
    76→  TOKEN_EXPIRED
    77→  DISCONNECTED
    78→}
    79→
    80→model ShopConnection {
    81→  id               String     @id @default(cuid())
    82→  userId           String     @map("user_id")
    83→  platform         Platform
    84→  platformShopId   String     @map("platform_shop_id")  // Shopee shop_id or TikTok shop_id
    85→  shopName         String     @map("shop_name")
    86→  region           String     // "ID", "MY", "TH", etc.
    87→  status           ShopStatus @default(ACTIVE)
    88→
    89→  // Encrypted at application layer before storing
    90→  accessTokenEnc   String     @map("access_token_enc")
    91→  refreshTokenEnc  String     @map("refresh_token_enc")
    92→  tokenExpiresAt   DateTime   @map("token_expires_at")
    93→
    94→  lastSyncAt       DateTime?  @map("last_sync_at")
    95→  createdAt        DateTime   @default(now()) @map("created_at")
    96→  updatedAt        DateTime   @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
    97→  disconnectedAt   DateTime?  @map("disconnected_at")
    98→
    99→  user       User         @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
   100→  bulkJobs   BulkJob[]
   101→  updateLogs UpdateLog[]
   102→
   103→  @@unique([userId, platform, platformShopId])
   104→  @@index([userId])
   105→  @@index([status])
   106→  @@map("shop_connections")
   107→}
   108→
   109→// ─── Product Cache ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   110→// This is a local cache of product data pulled from platforms.
   111→// Source of truth is always the platform. Sync via /api/products/sync.
   112→
   113→model ProductCache {
   114→  id                 String    @id @default(cuid())
   115→  shopConnectionId   String    @map("shop_connection_id")
   116→  platformProductId  String    @map("platform_product_id")  // Shopee item_id or TikTok product_id
   117→  name               String
   118→  coverImageUrl      String?   @map("cover_image_url")
   119→  status             String    // raw status string from platform
   120→  totalStock         Int       @default(0) @map("total_stock")
   121→  minPrice           Decimal   @map("min_price") @db.Decimal(15, 2)
   122→  maxPrice           Decimal   @map("max_price") @db.Decimal(15, 2)
   123→  currency           String    @default("IDR")
   124→  variantCount       Int       @default(1) @map("variant_count")
   125→  rawData            Json      @map("raw_data")   // full platform response cached
   126→  platformUpdatedAt  DateTime? @map("platform_updated_at")
   127→  cachedAt           DateTime  @default(now()) @map("cached_at")
   128→  updatedAt          DateTime  @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
   129→
   130→  // No FK to ShopConnection via Prisma — we manage this manually
   131→  // because shop can be deleted but we keep cache history
   132→
   133→  @@unique([shopConnectionId, platformProductId])
   134→  @@index([shopConnectionId])
   135→  @@index([status])
   136→  @@index([totalStock])
   137→  @@map("product_cache")
   138→}
   139→
   140→// ─── Update Logs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   141→// Audit trail for every update sent to platform.
   142→
   143→enum UpdateType {
   144→  STOCK
   145→  PRICE
   146→  IMAGE
   147→  PRODUCT_INFO
   148→}
   149→
   150→enum UpdateStatus {
   151→  SUCCESS
   152→  FAILED
   153→  PENDING
   154→}
   155→
   156→model UpdateLog {
   157→  id               String       @id @default(cuid())
   158→  shopConnectionId String       @map("shop_connection_id")
   159→  platformProductId String      @map("platform_product_id")
   160→  variantId        String?      @map("variant_id")
   161→  updateType       UpdateType   @map("update_type")
   162→  status           UpdateStatus
   163→  previousValue    Json?        @map("previous_value")
   164→  newValue         Json         @map("new_value")
   165→  platformResponse Json?        @map("platform_response")
   166→  errorMessage     String?      @map("error_message")
   167→  bulkJobId        String?      @map("bulk_job_id")
   168→  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now()) @map("created_at")
   169→
   170→  shopConnection ShopConnection @relation(fields: [shopConnectionId], references: [id])
   171→
   172→  @@index([shopConnectionId])
   173→  @@index([platformProductId])
   174→  @@index([updateType])
   175→  @@index([createdAt])
   176→  @@index([bulkJobId])
   177→  @@map("update_logs")
   178→}
   179→
   180→// ─── Bulk Jobs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   181→
   182→enum BulkJobType {
   183→  STOCK
   184→  PRICE
   185→}
   186→
   187→enum BulkJobStatus {
   188→  QUEUED
   189→  PROCESSING
   190→  COMPLETED
   191→  FAILED
   192→  PARTIAL       // some succeeded, some failed
   193→}
   194→
   195→model BulkJob {
   196→  id               String        @id @default(cuid())
   197→  userId           String        @map("user_id")
   198→  shopConnectionId String        @map("shop_connection_id")
   199→  type             BulkJobType
   200→  status           BulkJobStatus @default(QUEUED)
   201→  totalItems       Int           @map("total_items")
   202→  successCount     Int           @default(0) @map("success_count")
   203→  failedCount      Int           @default(0) @map("failed_count")
   204→  progress         Int           @default(0)  // 0-100
   205→  payload          Json          // serialized list of items to process
   206→  errors           Json?         // Array of { productId, variantId, errorCode, message }
   207→  queueJobId       String?       @map("queue_job_id")  // BullMQ job ID
   208→  startedAt        DateTime?     @map("started_at")
   209→  completedAt      DateTime?     @map("completed_at")
   210→  createdAt        DateTime      @default(now()) @map("created_at")
   211→  updatedAt        DateTime      @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
   212→
   213→  user           User           @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
   214→  shopConnection ShopConnection @relation(fields: [shopConnectionId], references: [id])
   215→
   216→  @@index([userId])
   217→  @@index([shopConnectionId])
   218→  @@index([status])
   219→  @@index([createdAt])
   220→  @@map("bulk_jobs")
   221→}
   222→
   223→// ─── Webhook Events ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   224→// Incoming webhook events from Shopee/TikTok, stored before processing.
   225→
   226→model WebhookEvent {
   227→  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
   228→  platform    Platform
   229→  eventType   String   @map("event_type")
   230→  payload     Json
   231→  signature   String?
   232→  processed   Boolean  @default(false)
   233→  processedAt DateTime? @map("processed_at")
   234→  error       String?
   235→  receivedAt  DateTime @default(now()) @map("received_at")
   236→
   237→  @@index([platform])
   238→  @@index([processed])
   239→  @@index([receivedAt])
   240→  @@map("webhook_events")
   241→}
   242→
   243→// ─── OAuth State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   244→// CSRF state tokens for OAuth flows. Short-lived.
   245→
   246→model OAuthState {
   247→  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
   248→  state     String   @unique
   249→  userId    String   @map("user_id")
   250→  platform  Platform
   251→  expiresAt DateTime @map("expires_at")
   252→  usedAt    DateTime? @map("used_at")
   253→  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
   254→
   255→  @@index([state])
   256→  @@index([expiresAt])
   257→  @@map("oauth_states")
   258→}
   259→```
   260→
   261→---
   262→
   263→## Entity Relationship Description
   264→
   265→### User → ShopConnection (One-to-Many)
   266→One user can connect multiple shops. Each shop is tied to one platform (Shopee or TikTok). A user can have multiple Shopee shops and multiple TikTok shops simultaneously.
   267→
   268→### ShopConnection → ProductCache (One-to-Many)
   269→Each shop's products are cached locally per-shop. The cache is identified by `shopConnectionId + platformProductId` (unique pair). Cache is refreshed on sync or when invalidated by webhook.
   270→
   271→### ShopConnection → UpdateLog (One-to-Many)
   272→Every update sent to Shopee or TikTok creates an UpdateLog entry. This provides full audit trail per shop. Logs are never deleted.
   273→
   274→### ShopConnection → BulkJob (One-to-Many)
   275→Bulk jobs are scoped per shop. A job belongs to both a User (for auth) and a ShopConnection (for platform context).
   276→
   277→### BulkJob → UpdateLog (One-to-Many via bulkJobId)
   278→Items processed by a bulk job each create their own UpdateLog. Link via `bulkJobId` field on UpdateLog.
   279→
   280→### User → RefreshToken (One-to-Many)
   281→Multiple device sessions supported. Each device gets its own refresh token. Revoking one doesn't affect others.
   282→
   283→---
   284→
   285→## Redis Key Schema
   286→
   287→All Redis keys use `lookup:` prefix.
   288→
   289→| Key Pattern | Type | TTL | Content |
   290→|-------------|------|-----|---------|
   291→| `lookup:product:{shopId}:{productId}` | String (JSON) | 5m | Full product detail from platform |
   292→| `lookup:product_list:{shopId}:{page}:{filters_hash}` | String (JSON) | 2m | Paginated product list |
   293→| `lookup:token_check:{shopConnectionId}` | String | 30s | Token validity flag |
   294→| `lookup:sse:{userId}` | PubSub channel | - | Real-time event channel |
   295→| `bull:bulk-update` | BullMQ queue | - | Managed by BullMQ |
   296→
   297→---
   298→
   299→## Database Indexes Summary
   300→
   301→| Table | Index | Reason |
   302→|-------|-------|--------|
   303→| `users` | `email` UNIQUE | Login lookup |
   304→| `refresh_tokens` | `token` UNIQUE | Token lookup on refresh |
   305→| `refresh_tokens` | `userId` | Cascade operations |
   306→| `shop_connections` | `userId` | List user's shops |
   307→| `shop_connections` | `(userId, platform, platformShopId)` UNIQUE | Prevent duplicate connections |
   308→| `shop_connections` | `status` | Filter active shops |
   309→| `product_cache` | `(shopConnectionId, platformProductId)` UNIQUE | Cache lookup |
   310→| `product_cache` | `totalStock` | Sort/filter by stock |
   311→| `update_logs` | `shopConnectionId` | Audit by shop |
   312→| `update_logs` | `createdAt` | Time-range queries |
   313→| `bulk_jobs` | `userId` + `status` | List user's active jobs |
   314→| `webhook_events` | `processed` + `receivedAt` | Process unhandled events |
   315→
   316→---
   317→
   318→## Migration Naming Convention
   319→
   320→```
   321→YYYYMMDD_description.sql
   322→e.g.:
   323→20260629_initial_schema.sql
   324→20260701_add_product_cache.sql
   325→20260710_add_webhook_events.sql
   326→```
   327→
   328→---
   329→
   330→## Encryption
   331→
   332→Fields marked `_enc` in the schema are AES-256-GCM encrypted using the `ENCRYPTION_KEY` env var before being stored. Decryption happens in `src/utils/crypto.ts`. The encryption key must be 32 bytes (256 bits) — generate with:
   333→
   334→```bash
   335→node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(32).toString('hex'))"
   336→```
   337→
   338→Never store plaintext OAuth tokens in the database.

version: '3.9'

services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    container_name: lookup_postgres
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: lookup
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: lookup_dev
      POSTGRES_DB: lookup_db
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U lookup"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: lookup_redis
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  backend:
    build:
      context: ../apps/backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: lookup_backend
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: development
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://lookup:lookup_dev@postgres:5432/lookup_db
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
    env_file:
      - ../apps/backend/.env
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    volumes:
      - ../apps/backend:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    command: npm run dev

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: lookup_nginx
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
    depends_on:
      - backend

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

events { worker_connections 1024; }

http {
  upstream backend {
    server backend:3000;
  }

  server {
    listen 80;

    location /api/ {
      proxy_pass http://backend;
      proxy_http_version 1.1;
      proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
      proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
      proxy_set_header Host $host;
      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
      proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
    }

    location /webhooks/ {
      proxy_pass http://backend;
      proxy_set_header Host $host;
      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
    }

    # SSE
    location /api/events/ {
      proxy_pass http://backend;
      proxy_set_header Connection '';
      proxy_http_version 1.1;
      proxy_buffering off;
      proxy_cache off;
      chunked_transfer_encoding on;
    }
  }
}

version: '3.9'

services:
  backend:
    build:
      context: ../apps/backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL}
      - REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL}
      - JWT_SECRET=${JWT_SECRET}
      - JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=${JWT_REFRESH_SECRET}
      - ENCRYPTION_KEY=${ENCRYPTION_KEY}
      - SHOPEE_PARTNER_ID=${SHOPEE_PARTNER_ID}
      - SHOPEE_PARTNER_KEY=${SHOPEE_PARTNER_KEY}
      - SHOPEE_REDIRECT_URI=${SHOPEE_REDIRECT_URI}
      - TIKTOK_APP_KEY=${TIKTOK_APP_KEY}
      - TIKTOK_APP_SECRET=${TIKTOK_APP_SECRET}
      - TIKTOK_REDIRECT_URI=${TIKTOK_REDIRECT_URI}
      - CORS_ORIGIN=${CORS_ORIGIN}
      - PORT=3000
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  worker:
    build:
      context: ../apps/backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.worker
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL}
      - REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL}
      - ENCRYPTION_KEY=${ENCRYPTION_KEY}
      - SHOPEE_PARTNER_ID=${SHOPEE_PARTNER_ID}
      - SHOPEE_PARTNER_KEY=${SHOPEE_PARTNER_KEY}
      - TIKTOK_APP_KEY=${TIKTOK_APP_KEY}
      - TIKTOK_APP_SECRET=${TIKTOK_APP_SECRET}
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped

  postgres:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=${POSTGRES_USER:-lookup}
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-lookup_prod}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-lookup}"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:

FROM node:20-alpine AS base
RUN npm install -g pnpm

FROM base AS deps
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml ./
COPY apps/backend/package.json ./apps/backend/
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

FROM base AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY --from=deps /app/apps/backend/node_modules ./apps/backend/node_modules
COPY . .
WORKDIR /app/apps/backend
RUN pnpm build

FROM base AS runner
WORKDIR /app
ENV NODE_ENV=production
COPY --from=builder /app/apps/backend/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/apps/backend/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY --from=builder /app/apps/backend/prisma ./prisma
CMD ["node", "dist/workers/bulk.worker.js"]
